prose:
The Fukui reactivity of benzaldehyde was calculated using the fukui-reactivity skill.

**Fukui Reactivity Analysis for Benzaldehyde** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit OFF) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided in `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz`; a single-point calculation was performed on this fixed geometry. All states (neutral, cation, anion) converged without warnings.

**Results:**
The most electrophilic site (highest f⁺ value) is Carbon 3 (0-indexed: 2) with an f⁺ value of 0.39939.
The most nucleophilic site (highest f⁻ value) is Oxygen 1 (0-indexed: 0) with an f⁻ value of 0.23840.

The live `.out` log for this calculation is being written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplhwobtiw/live.json` — you can `tail -f` it now.
